name: js_ts_strict
description: JS->TS migration oracle: strict typecheck + tests green + build, with a zero escape-hatch budget. Authoritative escape-hatch counting should use the eslint count_cmd once configured per repo; the regex patterns are the dependency-free fallback.
_env_note: Propagates the tsx require-hook to gate subprocesses AND to any child node processes a test spawns (e.g. jsdom's setTimeout-GC fixture runs `node fixture.js`), so a partially-migrated tree's .ts modules load at runtime instead of crashing plain node.

escape_hatches.note: budget 0 = a passing run may introduce no new escape hatches. Set count_cmd to an eslint invocation that prints a single integer (e.g. matched problem count) for an authoritative, comment/string-aware count.
